questionHtml:
What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with whole numbers?

__Sn(OH)4 (aq) + __NaOH (aq) → __Na2SnO3 (aq) + __H2O (l)

A.  4

B.  5

C.  6

D.  7

meta.title: What is the sum of the coefficients when the equation is balanced with whole numbers? __Sn(OH)4 (aq) + __NaOH (aq) → __Na2SnO3 (aq) + __H2O (l) A. 4 B. 5 C. 6 D. 7
